name: Source Fidelity review for Circulating Factor Modulation bundle
summary: Revision 2 resolves the PMID 40424097 source-title mismatch. The staged source, study, and finding records now match the cited PubMed and PMC boundaries: animal parabiosis, cord-plasma, and plasma-dilution claims stay preclinical; healthy-adult TPE claims stay biomarker-level; PLASMA is feasibility and safety context; and AMBAR is Alzheimer disease-specific functional evidence.

findings.claim_or_issue: Revision 1 used a paraphrased title for PMID 40424097.
findings.why_it_matters: The revised staged source name now matches PubMed and can serve as a reliable public bibliographic anchor.
findings.recommended_action: Retain the corrected title in the staged source record.

findings.claim_or_issue: The source set mixes animal functional evidence, human surrogate biomarker evidence, a small young-plasma Alzheimer feasibility study, and a disease-specific AMBAR functional trial.
findings.why_it_matters: These source classes support different evidence tiers and should not be merged into a broad healthy-aging or LEV-relevant functional claim.
findings.recommended_action: Retain the staged caveats that keep animal effects preclinical, TPE aging signals biomarker-level, PLASMA non-efficacy-oriented, and AMBAR Alzheimer-specific.
